import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import '../styles/RecordingIndicators.css'; function RecordingIndicators() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [isSidebarOpen, setIsSidebarOpen] = useState(false); const [indicatorsData, setIndicatorsData] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { // TODO: Fetch data from backend // For now using sample data const sampleData = [ { date: '2024-03-20', fev1: '3.5', fvc: '4.2', pef: '450', respiratoryRate: '16', pulse: '75', cough: 'Mild', breathlessness: 'No', wheezing: 'No', chestTightness: 'No', nighttimeAwakenings: '0', medicine: 'Albuterol' }, // Add more sample data as needed ]; setIndicatorsData(sampleData); }, []); const handleLogout = () => { localStorage.removeItem('user_id'); navigate('/'); }; const toggleSidebar = () => { setIsSidebarOpen(!isSidebarOpen); }; return (

Asthma Monitoring

Recording Indicators

{indicatorsData.map((row, index) => ( ))}
Date FEV1 FVC PEF Respiratory Rate Pulse Cough Breathlessness Wheezing Chest Tightness Nighttime Awakenings Medicine
{row.date} {row.fev1} {row.fvc} {row.pef} {row.respiratoryRate} {row.pulse} {row.cough} {row.breathlessness} {row.wheezing} {row.chestTightness} {row.nighttimeAwakenings} {row.medicine}

Menu

); } export default RecordingIndicators;
